title: No Shield Delay
description: this plugin blocks damage even if it doesn't display the shield animation
body:
🔰 No Shield Delay
Version: 1.0
Minecraft Version: 1.21+

API: Paper / Spigot

📜 Description:
Tired of the annoying delay when raising your shield in combat? No Shield Delay removes the default cooldown and blocking animation delay, allowing players to raise their shield instantly when right-clicking — just like a true PvP master.

This plugin is perfect for competitive servers, PvP practice, or anyone who wants shield mechanics to feel snappier and more responsive.

⚙️ Features:
🚫 No Shield Activation Delay – Shield instantly raises on right-click.

🔁 Zero Cooldown – Cooldowns for shields are cleared every tick.

🛡️ Damage Blocking – Automatically blocks most incoming damage while shield is up.

💢 Fall Damage Still Applies – Players can still take fall damage normally for game balance.

⚡ Lightweight & Lag-Free – Uses efficient async-safe structures (like ConcurrentHashMap) and minimal resources.

💡 Use Cases:
PvP arenas

Hardcore faction servers

Custom minigames or duels

Faster-paced survival gameplay
